creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Tymoshenko from comment #7)

Ergh, I didn't realise/remember:

 - Add freebsd-$arch for arch specific ports tickets (Bug 196909)

For 'commit_ports_bugs' & 'new_ports_bugs' subroutines, is ports-bugs@ a (valid/working) alias for freebsd-ports bugs? If so, I didnt know :)

Are aliases for lists mentioned/listed anywhere, or is it implicit that all freebsd-*@ lists support the prefixless form?
